title: echium onosmifolium subsp. onosmifolium
intro: Echium onosmifolium subsp. onosmifolium, also known as the Spanish gorse or viper's bugloss, is a flowering plant species in the borage family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Echium onosmifolium subsp. onosmifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its possible use in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, or used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
